preamble: The lowering of a high front vowel /i/ to a mid front vowel /e/, a standard process in the evolution of Romance languages and various other lineages.

examples.note: Latin short /i/ lowered to /e/ in Spanish and Italian.
Latin short /i/ lowered to /e/ in Spanish.

sources: Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction.
